title: AGENT_REGISTERED event payload
description: Payload for AGENT_REGISTERED ledger events. Carries the full AgentIdentity artifact. Governance rationale: Invariant 4 (Reconstructability) — the ledger alone must answer who was registered, when, and by whom.

agent_identity.description: Full AgentIdentity artifact as defined in /shared/artifact-contracts/v2/AgentIdentity.schema.json. Validated separately by the AgentIdentity schema at registration time.
